mapper.insert: /* MemberToken.upsertMemberToken */ INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER_TOKEN ( MEMBER_ID, ACCESS_TOKEN, REFRESH_TOKEN, ACCESS_TOKEN_EXP_TM, REFRESH_TOKEN_EXP_TM, CRE_TM ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{accessTokenExpTm}, #{refreshTokenExpTm}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (MEMBER_ID) DO UPDATE SET ACCESS_TOKEN = EXCLUDED.ACCESS_TOKEN, REFRESH_TOKEN = EXCLUDED.REFRESH_TOKEN, ACCESS_TOKEN_EXP_TM = EXCLUDED.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXP_TM, REFRESH_TOKEN_EXP_TM = EXCLUDED.REFRESH_TOKEN_EXP_TM, CRE_TM = NOW()
mapper.select: /* MemberToken.selectTokenByAccessToken */ SELECT ID AS id, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, ACCESS_TOKEN AS accessToken, REFRESH_TOKEN AS refreshToken, ACCESS_TOKEN_EXP_TM AS accessTokenExpTm, REFRESH_TOKEN_EXP_TM AS refreshTokenExpTm, CRE_TM AS creTm FROM TB_MEMBER_TOKEN WHERE ACCESS_TOKEN = #{accessToken}
